title: elatostematoides rigida var. polyclada
intro: Elatostematoides rigida var. polyclada is a plant species, also known as Elatostema polycladum, belonging to the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in Southeast Asian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatostematoides rigida var. polyclada include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of this plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
